title: Smoky Donabe Steamed Saudi Arabian Chwinamul Paella
description: A smoky, springy, and show-off dish from Saudi Arabia featuring chwinamul and shio-cure, all cooked in a donabe.

ingredients.name: chwinamul
ingredients.notes: fresh or frozen, cut into 1-inch pieces

ingredients.name: shio-cure carrots
ingredients.notes: peeled and sliced into 1/4-inch thick rounds

ingredients.name: onion
ingredients.notes: peeled and sliced into 1/4-inch thick rings

instructions: Heat the donabe over medium heat.
Add olive oil and sauté the onion and garlic until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the rice and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika and stir to combine.
Add the chwinamul and shio-cure carrots, stir-fry for another 2 minutes.
Pour in 400ml of water and bring to a boil.
Cover the donabe with the lid and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 20-25 minutes or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Remove from the oven and stir in the lemon juice and salt.
Serve hot and garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
Let the dish rest for 10 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld.
